title: Expanding Sticky Wild
summary: Sticky variant of expanding-wild: an expanded reel stays fully wild for the rest of the free-spins round; towers accumulate up to a cap. Visuals, opening effect and sounds are identical to expanding-wild.

sharedWithBase.image: see expanding-wild.feature.json (one tall columnArt, width-fit 0.98, top-anchored, bottom-crops)
sharedWithBase.openEffect: identical (expandOneWildReel) — tClear 0.32s, tRace 0.40s, race 0.46s expo.inOut, lock squash 0.08s + settle 0.55s elastic.out(1,0.4), impact flash, board slam, reel shine, idle breath

multipliers.note: Field retained in contract; set to 1 (off) because the 10-spin round forms the full board too often — a >1 value pushes RTP past 105%.
